docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-03-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JASON ZAMLICH IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSICA ARMSTRONG IS NOT PRESENT. ON 12/8/23, PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $800 TO THE PLAINTIFF DONE IN MONTHLY PAYMENTS. DEFENDANT WILL PAY $100 BY THE 11TH OF EACH MONTH WITH CASHIER'S CHECK/MONEY ORDER MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF BY PROOF OF MAILING/PRIORITY MAIL WITH TRACKING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND A JUDGMENT WILL BE RENDERED FOR $1000 LESS BALANCE PAID. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF AUG-11-2024. THE FINAL PROGRESS REPORT DATE WILL BE SET AT SEP-11-2024, AND IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2024 - JUDGMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAMLICH, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, JESSICA $700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAMLICH, JASON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2024 BY CAROLYN GOLD. PLAINTIFF JASON ZAMLICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSICA ARMSTRONG IS NOT PRESENT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
